case_title: LOPEZ, BERNARDO S. VS HAMILTON, ERNEST et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2007 - JUDGMENT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE(MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2007. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVE LAU; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
